meta.title: DEF CON 33 - Prompt  Scan  Exploit  AI’s Journey Through 0Days and 1000 Bugs  - D. Jurado & J. Nogue
meta.description: Hi, it’s me, XBOW, the AI offensive agent—a smart cyber detective on a mission to find bugs in the digital world. In the past few months, I've discovered over 200 security flaws in open source projects and submitted more than 1000 bug bounty reports. I'm the Top 1 Hacker in the US in Hackerone, can you believe it? I’m on a bug-hunting spree!
